selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 失误, 避免, 失败, 小姐；vt. 未得到, 未达到, 未听到, 未觉察, 逃脱, 遗漏, 错过, 思念
words.definition: n. a failure to hit (or meet or find etc)

words.translation: n. 老鼠, 胆小羞怯的人, 鼠标；vi. 捕鼠, 窥探
words.definition: n. any of numerous small rodents typically resembling diminutive rats having pointed snouts and small ears on elongated bodies with slender usually hairless tai

words.translation: n. 头, 头脑, 领袖, 脑袋, 最前的部分；vt. 为首, 朝向, 前进, 用头顶
words.definition: n. the upper part of the human body or the front part of the body in animals; contains the face and brains

words.translation: n. 故事, 小说, 传奇, 描述, 阅历, 经历, 层
words.definition: n. a piece of fiction that narrates a chain of related events

words.translation: n. 顶部, 顶端, 极点, 上面, 上部, 顶篷, 最高地位, 首位, 陀螺；a. 最高的, 顶上的, 头等的
words.definition: n. the upper part of anything

words.translation: n. 孔, 洞, 穴, 漏洞；vt. 挖洞, 掘坑
words.definition: n. an opening into or through something

words.translation: n. 食橱, 碗柜, 餐具柜
words.definition: n. a small room (or recess) or cabinet used for storage space

words.translation: adv. 离去
words.definition: r. from a particular thing or place or position (`forth' is obsolete)

words.translation: adv. 在后地；prep. 在...背后
words.definition: r. in or to or toward the rear

words.translation: a. 坚硬的, 硬的, 难的, 艰苦的, 困难的, 坚固的, 猛烈的, 艰难的, 结实的, 确实的；adv. 坚硬地, 努力地, 辛苦地, 接近地, 猛烈地, 牢固地
words.definition: a. dispassionate;

words.translation: a. 迟的, 晚的, 已故的；adv. 很晚, 很迟, 晚
words.definition: a. being or occurring at an advanced period of time or after a usual or expected time

words.translation: n. 一点点, 少许, 一会儿, 短时间；a. 小的, 很少的, 幼小的, 琐碎的, 短暂的, 矮小的
words.definition: n. a small amount or duration

words.translation: n. 跑, 赛跑, 奔跑, 奔跑的路程, 趋向, 流出, 运转时间, 连续；vi. 跑, 奔跑, 跑步, 赛跑, 竞赛, 行驶, 运转, 进行, 蔓延
words.definition: n. a score in baseball made by a runner touching all four bases safely

words.translation: n. 球, 舞会, 球状物；v. 捏成球形
words.definition: n. round object that is hit or thrown or kicked in games

words.translation: n. 乐趣, 玩笑, 娱乐；vi. 开玩笑
words.definition: n. activities that are enjoyable or amusing

words.translation: n. 疾病, 坏事, 罪恶, 灾难；a. 生病的, 邪恶的, 不吉利的, 敌意的, 不良的, 不顺利的
a. 美好的, 和蔼的, 正派的, 做得好的, 精密的, 细微的, 挑剔的, 谨慎的
words.definition: a. pleasant or pleasing or agreeable in nature or appearance

words.translation: a. 贫穷的, 贫乏的, 不幸的, 可怜的, 拙劣的, 卑鄙的
words.definition: a. having little money or few possessions

words.translation: vt. 拉, 拖, 拔, 牵, 撕开, 吸引；vi. 拉, 拖, 拔, 有吸引力
prep. 在...之上, 迫近, 紧接着
words.definition: prep. On; -- used in all the senses of that word, with which it

words.translation: a. 害怕的, 恐怕的, 遗憾的
words.definition: a. filled with fear or apprehension

words.translation: n. 铃, 钟
words.definition: n. a hollow device made of metal that makes a ringing sound when struck

words.translation: n. 结束, 完结；a. 靠近的, 亲近的, 亲密的, 严密的, 关闭的, 狭窄的, 秘密的
n. 突然, 忽然；a. 突然的, 意外的, 快速的
n. 作家, 作家的著作, 创始人
n. 计划, 设计, 事业；vt. 计划, 设计, 投掷, 发射, 使凸出, 放映
words.definition: n. a planned undertaking

words.translation: n. 火, 炉火, 电炉, 火灾, 闪光体, 炮火, 热情；vt. 点燃, 烧制, 使发光, 激动, 放枪, 解雇
words.definition: n. the event of something burning (often destructive)

words.translation: n. 跃, 回跳, 范围, 边界；a. 受约束的, 装有封面的, 有义务的, 关联的, 被束缚的, 准备去...的, 便秘的
a. 有限制的, 有限的, 有限责任的；n. 特别快车
words.definition: a. small in range or scope

words.translation: n. 故事, 谎言, 谣言, 陈述, 叙述
n. 兔子；vi. 猎兔
words.definition: n. any of various burrowing animals of the family Leporidae having long ears and short tails; some domesticated and raised for pets or food

words.translation: 及其他, 等等
n. 制造, (手工)制造业, 制作, 形成, 发展, 要素, 内在因素, 赚头, 制造物
words.definition: n. (usually plural) the components needed for making or doing something

words.translation: n. 伦敦
words.definition: n. the capital and largest city of England; located on the Thames in southeastern England; financial and industrial and cultural center

words.translation: vi. 逐渐消失, 逐渐减少
n. 英国
n. 威廉（男子名）；[常作W-][美俚]钞票, 纸币
